raw_text: this app is amazing.I'm impressed the way they carry it, not so gentle, but careful. lately I bought a book and I was amazed because I thought it could be pirated, but it was a real copy, absolutely good one with no damage, zero damage. but what I'm concerned about is there's only limited books. please, Blinkit, stock it with atleast the serie's books , because if book 1 is there, book 2 isn't there. that's why I can't rely on it. please blinkit, stock it. I kindly expect a reply don't say no.😊

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I've tried many quick-commerce apps during this heavy rainfall, but most of them either stopped taking orders or marked their platforms as unavailable. Blinkit was the only app that continued serving customers by delivering orders in batches with short intervals. Even if the delivery took a little longer, they never stopped serving. A huge thanks to the Blinkit team and delivery partners for their dedication and hard work in such difficult weather. Truly appreciated!

Extremely disappointed with Blinkit. I accidentally ordered the same Nivea product twice and requested a replacement for one unopened item, but my request was refused because of their rigid policy. It's frustrating to see no flexibility for genuine customer mistakes. This experience has greatly reduced my trust in Blinkit. I hope they improve their customer service and replacement policy.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Blinkit has made daily shopping incredibly convenient. The delivery is consistently fast, the app is easy to use, and the wide range of products means I can find almost everything I need in one place. The delivery partners are polite, and the packaging is always neat. It's a huge time-saver, especially during busy days. Highly recommended for anyone looking for quick and reliable grocery and essentials delivery!

very happy with blinkit service. I've been using it since many years. Recently I was on a trip to Jammu and needed something urgently. and sure blinkit was there. while I am fine with some extra fees sometimes, i understand most part of India may not. reduce the extra delivery charge, taxes, surcharge and small town people may be more willing to order.

Extremely disappointed with Blinkit's customer service. My refund has been pending for a long time, and a considerable amount of my money is stuck. The worst part is that there's no way to speak to a real customer support representative. The AI assistant keeps looping through the same menu without resolving the issue. This has been a very frustrating experience. I expected much better support from Blinkit.

Blinkit's return and refund policy is pathetic. Most items are marked as non-refundable, and if you accidentally place the wrong order, there is little to no support or resolution from customer service. A better customer-centric approach, especially for genuine ordering mistakes, would greatly improve the overall experience.

Have used the app for quite a while now and from 3 different locations over the years. I have always been satisfied with the end result. Easy to use, wide range of products and good customer service. Blinkit delivers what is ordered with no hanky panky like i have experienced with other delivery apps. Thank u Blinkit for making my life so much easier!!

It's pretty good application for ordering groceries, electronics. You could avoid hustling last moments for essential goods like printouts, stationary. For me this is one of the best app available out there for fast delivery.⭐️⭐️

I ordered BoldFit medium-size gloves but received a different brand in the wrong size. When I requested a return, it was rejected, claiming the product was used. This is completely unfair. You delivered the wrong item and then refused the return. I expect an immediate refund or replacement.

worst app, They cancelled order without any issue and when I received order the items are different, I didn't receive my ordered items, sometimes they sent some missing items, I will never order again from this app. one day they didn't sent the items and also the money not sent by the app when I made an query then they said we will sent the order in 15 minutes but I didn't receive the order and also not the refund, then I made an query again then they refund the money , worst app, zero rating,,.

Ordered and payment debited but blinkit showed that payment not confirmed and will revert the payment within 3-5 days that's okay. so placed another order with same content and now blinkit sent both the orders and there is no option to cancell. also the live chat agent is showing busy. what kind of scam is this??? I would be raising this consumer greiveince.

It's a great app, I've been using it for first' time and i haven't faced any problem, the delivery is incredibly fast, most orders arrive within 10 minutes, today i order something and get it in just 7 minutes. Also the customer care is very good, few days ago I got damaged product then i call them they respond very well and sends me a fresh new product in few minutes, my overall experience is so good

Worst experience faced today after using it for more than a year.. Always had COD option for orders, but today they have removed it from their app.. This is what these startups do after they make people addicted and so that they can harass customers .. Customers make the payment in advance and then keep calling the delivery if the del gets late or they just cancel the order and customer has to then keep calling to get their refund..

They sent me faulty powerbank which didnt even work for a day and then didn't even replaced it even after giving big tile of replacement of 7 days policy on their product page this is unacceptable. They are sending us faulty items and then they say us that there is warranty now u go with the hassle of dealing with the company regarding faulty item.

very very worst experience. Price is very high for many items but it is anyhow manageable but Return option is not available even if it defective one. They don't allow buyer to return. They are taking advantages of customers like me who are attracted by their faster delivery option. Amazon & flipkart are very supportive in returning the item irrespective of returnable or non returnable item.

My order has not been delivered to me, even though the Blinkit app shows it as "Delivered." I reported this issue and raised a complaint immediately, but no action has been taken so far. This lack of response has been extremely frustrating.

This App has been designed in such a way that once you click the amount of TIP for the Delivery Person - say Rs. 20, and it asks you if you would like it to be the default TIP Amount for all future orders. However, after that, there is no provision to change the Default Tip amount! Even for a Rs. 50 item you pay the base prices, the handling charges, the surcharge (when applicable) and the Tip. All together could go up to Rs. 120 ! BLINKIT IS DECEIVING PEOPLE. Need to file at CONSUMER COURT.

I am disappointed with my recent experience with Blinkit. The service did not meet my expectations, especially regarding the refund process. The app does not clearly show the refund status, making it confusing for customers to know whether their refund has been initiated or when they can expect to receive it. Customer support should provide clearer communication and a more transparent refund tracking system. They took the defect product but haven't replaced or did refund until this period.

I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience. I accidentally ordered the wrong laptop charger and immediately tried to return it. However, I was informed that the item is not eligible for return, without being provided with any reasonable resolution. This is very frustrating because mistakes can happen while placing an order, especially for electronic accessories where compatibility is important. As a customer, I expected better support and at least an option for a return, exchange, or
